sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12499" key="a)podioriste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποδιορ-ιστέον</orth>, <sense id="n12499.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must mark off, separate,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινά τινος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0748.tlg001:p.35D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sever.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Clyst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.35D.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
